message:
test(conformance): matrix-envelope harness + spec_reference for five families

Extends the differential matrix-envelope harness (first rolled out in
"iconv phase-1" and "ctype_ops" commits) to five more conformance
families, and adds the `description` + `spec_reference` metadata
fields to their matching JSON fixtures.

Harness additions (each +112–119 lines):

  crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/memcpy_strict_conformance_test.rs
  crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/pwd_ops_conformance_test.rs
  crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/stdio_file_ops_conformance_test.rs
  crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/string_strtok_conformance_test.rs
  crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/strlen_strict_conformance_test.rs

Each gains:
  * `use std::process::{Command, Stdio};` for the host-libc oracle
    subprocess invocation path.
  * `FixtureFile { spec_reference: String, … }` field with
    `#[serde(default)]` so older fixtures still deserialize.
  * `MatrixCaseEnvelope { kind, run: Option<DifferentialExecution>,
    error: Option<String> }` decoder for per-case differential vs.
    error classification.
  * `DifferentialExecution { impl_output, host_parity }` inner type
    describing the frankenlibc output against the host flag.
  * `execute_case_via_harness(function, inputs)` helper that drives
    the case through the frankenlibc harness and compares against
    the host oracle output when the case opts into parity mode.

Fixture additions:

  tests/conformance/fixtures/memcpy_strict.json
    "description": "Strict memcpy fixtures covering full, partial,
                   zero-length, and single-byte copies.",
    "spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 memcpy"

  tests/conformance/fixtures/pwd_ops.json
    "spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 getpwnam, getpwuid, getpwent"

  tests/conformance/fixtures/stdio_file_ops.json
    "spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 fopen, fread, fwrite, fseek,
                       ftell, fclose"

  tests/conformance/fixtures/string_strtok.json
    "spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 strtok, strtok_r"

  tests/conformance/fixtures/strlen_strict.json
    "description": "Strict strlen fixtures over embedded-null,
                   boundary-aligned, and wide-input strings.",
    "spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 strlen"

These metadata fields are consumed by the harness's failure
diagnostic to print the POSIX/C spec reference when a differential
fails — matching the convention established by the iconv + ctype
rollouts.

.beads/issues.jsonl
  * Flushes the conformance-rollout tracker entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
